thought.text: No global_ctors needed. Let me look at a complex global init example:

action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -l "^@.*=.*global" build/test/task3/*/*/answer.ll | head -3 | while read f; do echo "=== $f ==="; head -10 "$f" | grep -E "^@.*global"; done

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && grep -l \"^@.*=.*global\" build/test/task3/*/*/answer.ll | head -3 | while read f; do echo \"=== $f ===\"; head -10 \"$f\" | grep -E \"^@.*global\"; done", "security_risk": "LOW", "summary": "View global definitions"}
